name: ​Salesforce
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

​What Salesforce Does

​Salesforce is the sun around which the enterprise CRM world revolves. It is infinitely powerful and can be customized to do literally anything you want. However, for a 10-person agency, it is often overkill. It is best suited for massive agencies that manage thousands of businesses and need to integrate with proprietary data systems.

Source: Salesforce

​Key Features

  • ​Agentforce AI: Launched in 2025, this uses a “Flex Credit” model, charging roughly $0.10 per action for AI-driven customer service and sales tasks.
  • ​Infinite Customization: You can build custom objects and unique workflows for every niche you serve.
  • ​Data Cloud: Includes 2.5 million “Data Services Credits” per year on certain editions to power advanced analytics.

​Benefits of Salesforce

  • ​Future-Proof: You will never outgrow Salesforce. It can scale from 1 user to 100,000.
  • ​Complete Visibility: A “360-degree view” of your entire business.
  • Ecosystem and Customization: Salesforce’s customization allows agencies to tailor workflows, reporting, and integrations to match even the most complex sales, marketing, and service operations.

​Pricing

  • ​Starter Suite: $25/user/month
  • ​Professional: $80/user/month
  • ​Agentforce Add-On: $125/user/month for unlimited internal AI agent usage.

​Pros

​✅ The most powerful and flexible CRM in the world.

✅ Industry-standard reporting and security.

​Cons

​🚫 Extremely steep learning curve: often requires a dedicated admin.

🚫 High implementation costs, often ranging from $50,000 to $150,000 for mid-market firms.

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

​”I like how the Salesforce Platform is easy to use, whether you're an admin or a developer. Creating new lightweight apps using pre-existing components is incredibly simple. I appreciate the excellent security it provides to the organization through the privileges concept. It's the best CRM for getting leads and converting them into opportunities. The simple UI with great objects like accounts, contacts, and leads, etc., really stands out.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
